'''Gertrude's Cat''' is a short [[quest]] in which you have to find [[Fluffs]], a lost pet cat owned by [[Gertrude]]. Completion of the quest allows you to adopt a feline companion of your very own.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Go to [[Gertrude]]'s house which is just west of [[Varrock]].
|startmap = 3150,3412
|difficulty = Novice
|description = Gertrude has lost her cat Fluffs and desperately wants to find her. Can you help bring her home?
|length = Very Short
|items = * [[Bucket of milk]]
* 100 [[coins]]
* [[Seasoned sardine]] (Bought from the [[Grand Exchange]]) or alternatively:
** [[Raw sardine]] (can be bought from [[Gerrant's Fishy Business.]])
** [[Doogle leaves]] (obtainable during the quest)
|recommended = *[[Ring of charos (a)]] (to choose the colour of your [[kitten]])
*[[Axe]] and 100 coins to cut down a dying tree in the [[Lumber Yard]] and create a normal plank for two [[easy Varrock Diary]] tasks.
*Fast travel to several locations
**[[Cooks' Guild]] in [[Varrock]] (2 trips) - [[Skills necklace]] or [[Varrock Teleport]] or [[Ring of wealth]] to [[Grand Exchange]] or [[Chronicle]]
**[[Lumberyard]] east of [[Varrock]] (1 trip) - [[Lumberyard Teleport]] or [[Ring of the elements]]
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Desert}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the quest
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Fremennik}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the quest
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Kandarin}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the quest
</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
===Starting out===
{{Needed|100 [[coins]].}}

[[File:Gertrude chathead.png|left]]
Speak to [[Gertrude]] at her house west of [[Varrock]], south of the [[Cooks' Guild]]. She has lost her cat, [[Fluffs]], and she wants you to look for her. Her two children were the last to see her. If you don't already have a [[seasoned sardine]],  pick up some [[doogle leaves]] to the south.

Head to the [[Varrock Square]] and talk to [[Wilough]] or [[Shilop]]. They will tell you about their secret playground, which is the last place they remember seeing Fluffs. Pay them {{NoCoins|100}} coins to tell you the location, which is the [[Lumber Yard]] found north-east of Varrock.
[[File:Gertrude's Cat - Fluffs.png|thumb|220px|Fluffs, located on the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}} in the Lumberyard.]]

===The secret playground (Lumber Yard)===
{{Needed|[[Bucket of milk]], and [[seasoned sardine]] '''OR''' [[raw sardine]] and [[doogle leaves]].|recommended=[[Lumberyard teleport]]. An [[axe]] to complete an [[easy Varrock Diary]] task.}}

At the [[Lumber Yard]], climb-over the broken fence on the southern side to enter, then climb up the ladder in the centre of the area. There you will find Gertrude's cat, [[Fluffs]]. Try to pick-up the cat and she will hiss at you, then use a [[bucket of milk]] on her and try to pick her up again. She will still hiss. Use the [[doogle leaves]] on the [[raw sardine]] to make a [[seasoned sardine]] and use it on her. Try to pick her up again and she will be afraid to leave; in the distance you can hear kittens mewing...

{{Map|x:3315,y:3515,title:Crate|x:3298,y:3514,title:Crate|x:3303,y:3506,title:Crate|x:3307,y:3507,title:Crate|x:3305,y:3500,title:Crate|x:3310,y:3499,title:Crate|mtype=pin|icon=greenPin|caption=Locations of all crates where kittens can potentially be found.|align=right
}}

Go down the ladder and search through the nearby [[crate (Gertrude's Cat)|crates]] with the yellow "Mew!" above them. Despite the mews moving around, the location of the kitten remains the same, so keep searching different crates until you find [[Fluffs' kitten]]. '''Click on continue''' and the kitten appears in your inventory. Do '''not''' drop the kitten or it will run away and you will have to find it again.

:'''Note:''' If the kitten didn't appear in your inventory, log out and back in.


Go back up the ladder and use the kitten on Fluffs, and they will both return home.

Return to Gertrude to complete the quest. Wear a [[ring of charos (a)]] if you want to choose the colour of your kitten reward.

'''Congratulations, quest complete!'''

==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name = Gertrude's Cat
|image = [[File:Gertrude's Cat reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 1
|rewards = 
*{{SCP|Cooking|1,525}} [[Cooking]] [[experience]]
*Your own [[kitten]]
*[[Chocolate cake]]
*[[Stew]]
*[[Gertrude]] will now sell kittens for you to raise for {{NoCoins|100}} coins each.
}}

Note for '''[[ironmen]]:''' Keep the [[chocolate cake]] quest reward for the [[A Tail of Two Cats]] [[quest]] and the [[stew]] for the [[The Queen of Thieves]] quest.

==Required for completing==
Completion of Gertrude's Cat is required for the following:
* [[Icthlarin's Little Helper]]
* [[Recipe for Disaster]] - [[Freeing Evil Dave]]
* [[Medium Varrock Diary]] - ''Select a colour for your kitten.''
